message:
fix: remove dead SQLite duplicate-error check in fixtures importFromJSONL (bd-tn12)

CreateIssue uses ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE (upsert) since GH#2061, so it never
returns duplicate-key errors. The SQLite-era 'UNIQUE constraint failed' check
was dead code that could never match on Dolt. Remove it and propagate errors
directly.

Executed-By: beads/polecats/pearl
Rig: beads
Role: polecats
